description: Create the right board room impression with this stacked-heeled formal shoe from bata. Bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this shoe tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this shoe that is as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!UpperLeather upper with stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded inner and tongueElasticated inserts at the sides of the tingueUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel that has horizontal groovesShoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
